title: Turn the comments back on YouTube!

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder Vlog, January 28th, January 19th, 628 p.m.
Um, I haven't had, I didn't do a video the last couple days, because I guess, switched gears.
And it's hard to do videos when you switch gears, but now, here's my first video since switching gears, so.
Um, so yeah, I've been writing, I think today was my second day.
Um, yesterday I rode like 60 miles, and then today it was like 65 miles, that's all I can do a day.
And I can only go like 80 watts, um, total, total wreck, total disaster.
Um, but, you know, the body's adaptable, you just keep working at it, and you get better.
Um, yeah, I have a membership over at the gym with my mom, and I went swimming, riding there after yesterday,
The day before yesterday and yesterday, but not today.
But maybe tomorrow, yeah, every day, we'll go over there and ride with her for a little bit and stretch and stuff.
Um, so I got a new bike, I'll do the video, I'll show the video of it later.
Um, it's the nicest bike you can get.
Specialized, it works, Shiv.
Uh, yeah, so, um, I, uh, um, yesterday I rode, and then I conked out, and then I had a little bit of energy,
So I rode, but then I was only able to ride like six more miles, got to the point where I couldn't even push the pedals around anymore,
Because I didn't have the strength, really, even to hold myself up on the bike, so it's just, it's...
But then I got up, I slept, and then I got up this morning, I got like five, and I worked, and then I, um,
And then I, yeah, took a nap, and then I rode, and then I got something to eat.
I went to the sandwich place.
It's the important thing for me, luckily for me, I don't have to work, so I have a huge advantage.
Um, but I'm old, and I'm out of shape, so that's my disadvantage.
Um, like way out of shape.
Um, I haven't done anything for years and years and years and years, you know, and...
Don't even have a really lifetime exercise, so...
It's gonna take me a while to get back.
Um, yeah, so, um, but, yeah, so the thing I have to worry about is, obviously, sleep is good, um,
And I have to make sure that I'm eating enough.
Um, I'm accussing my body to eating the goose, so I've been eating goose.
All I had to eat today was a sandwich and the goose, so, and a bunch of energy drinks, and that's it.
So, um, you know, my appetite isn't really kicked in yet, so...
My bike is nice, um, it's got the, um, button shifters, which is great.
Um, yeah, so I'm gonna see if I can do...
Maybe I can crank it up some.
I'm not gonna do 3,000 miles in a month.
I'm way too out of shape for that.
Time for being able to do that or is long gone, I'm not, I can't do that.
But it's possible that if I, um, start with the 7 hours, with the 70 miles a day, 60, 70, 65 miles a day,
I could do 60 miles a day and then work that up to 100 and start doing 100 without having to take a day off.
Um, so we'll see.
I got a swimming erg, FOSA swimming erg, supposed to come today, but, uh, didn't say it was gonna come tomorrow,
So that'll be interesting to play with.
So, uh, what...
Hey, I'm definitely motivated to do it now.
I mean, there's a lot of other stuff that I need to do on my website, but, you know,
I've had this much time in my life to finish something and I never managed to, so fuck it.
Let's just not finish anything, get started on something else.
And then you can finish that other stuff later once I, once I settle into a rhythm.
Um, so, yeah, I was just smoking a lot of weed.
You know, when I run out of weed, I'm going to, um, obviously not ever buy anymore because, um, I can't...
Some people can have a balance with that kind of a thing, but I can't.
Um, plus I have really sensitive lungs and so it's better for me to just stay away from it, you know?
I mean, I probably will if somebody offers.
I'll probably have, like, a head or whatever, but I'm going to be done with the weed.
I've been smoking so much weed that, like, that's one reason I didn't upload the videos
Is trying to smoke all my weed, but also I've been smoking...
Smoking so much weed that I can barely even ride my bike.
Like, I don't even have enough energy to hold myself up on the bike.

Probably, maybe after this video, I'll get up and smoke the rest of my weed and then...

It's too stressful.

I'm freaking out, always looking for my stuff and then hurting myself, banging into things
And it's just, uh, it's going to be better to just get off the weed.

Another advantage that I have is that I, um, don't have that many lifetime exercise, you know,
